sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the image, the green block is now next to the blue block but they're side by side, not overlapping. Let me check the exact positions.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions after UP + RIGHT
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Block positions ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('R', 'b', 'N') and min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) < 50:
        r = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']}: ({r}, {c}), {n['pixels']}px")

# Check player position
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) < 50:
        r = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"  Player: ({r}, {c})")

# Check if green and blue overlap
print("\n=== Adjacency ===")
for pair in seg['adjacency_list']:
    i, j = pair
    ci = seg['nodes'][i]['color']
    cj = seg['nodes'][j]['color']
    if ci in ('R', 'b', 'N') or cj in ('R', 'b', 'N'):
        print(f"  {ci} <-> {cj}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content:

<parameter=code>
# Green at (19, 36), Blue at (19, 42) - same row, 6 cols apart

</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
